name: impersonated-fetch
description: Node.js fetch port scaffold for requests_go impersonation backend

scripts.test: npm run build && node --disable-warning=MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON --test --test-reporter=tap test/client/client-session.test.ts test/errors/errors-abort.test.ts test/fetch/facade.test.ts test/fingerprint/fixture.test.ts test/impersonation/serialize.test.ts test/impersonation/types.test.ts test/native/abi.test.ts test/native/assets.test.ts test/native/transport.test.ts test/transport/capabilities.test.ts
scripts.test:watch: node --disable-warning=MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON --test --watch test/client/client-session.test.ts test/errors/errors-abort.test.ts test/fetch/facade.test.ts test/fingerprint/fixture.test.ts test/impersonation/serialize.test.ts test/impersonation/types.test.ts test/native/abi.test.ts test/native/assets.test.ts test/native/transport.test.ts test/transport/capabilities.test.ts
scripts.test:fingerprint: npm run build && node --disable-warning=MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON --test --test-reporter=tap test/fingerprint/smoke.test.ts --test-name-pattern fingerprint-smoke
scripts.test:package: npm run build && node test/package/cjs-require-test.cjs && node test/package/esm-test.mjs
